productName: Seattle Bubble Works- Hash Infused Joint- Trainwreck (S) - 0.75g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Trainwreck and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of pine, earthy, and woody, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
